alkylation reagent: initial blocking of free Cys thiols by NEM
collision energy: with a normalized collision energy setting of 45.
enrichment method: resin-assisted capture of the nascent protein thiols
instrument: MS analysis was performed on a Thermo Scientific LTQ-Orbitrap Velos Pro mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled with an electrospray ionization interface
labeling: on-resin tryptic digestion and TMT labeling
reduction reagent: DTT was used to reduce all reversibly oxidized protein thiols
reduction concentration: the reduction reaction was performed with 20 mM dithiothreitol (DTT)
